sourceEvidence.title: 示例大学附属医院李明医生公开主页
sourceEvidence.untrusted_text: 李明，示例大学附属医院研究医学科主任医师。擅长证据综合与方法学评价。教育与工作经历包括研究医学训练和医院科研工作。研究方向：示例研究主题、证据综合与方法学评价。代表性成果以公开文献记录为准。

sources.title: 示例大学附属医院李明医生公开主页

publicationEvidence.title: Verified Evidence Synthesis Study 1
publicationEvidence.abstract: BACKGROUND: Evidence synthesis methods require explicit boundaries between public abstract data and full-text appraisal. METHODS: This prospective observational study evaluated research questions, data sources, study design, analytic methods, outcomes, bias, and external applicability in an academic evidence workflow. RESULTS: Comparative analysis found that transparent source closure and cautious interpretation supported reproducible evidence mapping while unreported details remained unresolved. CONCLUSIONS: Observational associations cannot establish causality, and independent validation plus full-text review remain necessary.
